columns.name: ordresystem
columns.description: The system from which the order originates (B=Butikk, O=Optima)

columns.name: betformannet
columns.description: Indicates if the payment form is financing (F=Finansiering)

columns.name: avdnr
columns.description: The area number associated with the order

columns.name: fravargruppe
columns.description: The starting varegruppe (category) for the order

columns.name: tilvaregruppe
columns.description: The ending varegruppe (category) for the order

columns.name: sendespr
columns.description: The price used for sending, 99 indicates all

columns.name: antalliperiode
columns.description: Number of items in the specified period

columns.name: fknr
columns.description: The function number associated with the order line

columns.name: pris
columns.description: The price of the item or service

columns.name: avvikfraktkvant
columns.description: Used to choose the delivery quantity with the highest rate

columns.name: rabatter
columns.description: Indicates if there are no discounts for this order class/category (N=No discount)

columns.name: helgetillegg
columns.description: Indicates if the addition should not be included in holiday additions (N=No)
